entities.name: CRM System
entities.context: Personal relationship management system with individual profiles, event logs, and follow-up generation

entities.name: Individual Profile Schema
entities.context: Structured format for storing person data including context, background, interests, pain points, opportunities, and relationship history

entities.name: Event Log Schema
entities.context: Framework for tracking events and meetings, organized by month with cross-references to individuals

entities.name: SF Tech Week
entities.context: Event logged on 2025-10-09, stored in events/2025-10/ directory

entities.name: Enrichment Status
entities.context: Web research tracking mechanism within individual profiles

entities.name: Follow-ups System
entities.context: Generated follow-up messages linked to individuals and events, stored with platform context (e.g., LinkedIn)

relationships.context: CRM stores person data using the individual profile schema
CRM tracks meetings and occurrences using event log schema
CRM generates and stores follow-up messages for contacts
Individual profiles cross-reference events through Relationship History section
Follow-up messages are linked to specific individuals
Profiles track web research enrichment status for each individual
